note: Canonical golden DatHost cs2_settings for the DGLS match server (id 6824c4d10bf4444f5817d188). Captured live 2026-06-29. Provisioning PUTs these (dotted, e.g. `cs2_settings.game_mode`) to /game-servers/{id} BEFORE start, to overwrite any recreational-mode drift made in the panel between matches. Secrets (rcon, passwords, FTP/MySQL, GSLT) are intentionally omitted — never commit them.

per_match_overrides.note: Set at provision time, per match — NOT part of the static golden baseline.
per_match_overrides.cs2_settings.workshop_single_map_id: <the picked map's Steam workshop id, extracted from maps.workshop_url>
